authorization.statement: Please proceed for completion by 4:00 pm 07/22/26, Deliver in ACAD and PDF $600.00, Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan.

scope.deliverable: Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan
scope.drafting_basis: Point cloud and supporting information provided by BDPC
excluded: Survey, architectural, engineering, code, zoning, structural, MEP, civil, or life-safety certification

commercial.additional_services: Not included in the trial unless separately authorized

activation_gates.name: Licensed AutoCAD runtime
activation_gates.evidence: CAD Guardian will purchase the monthly AutoCAD subscription after payment is received

activation_gates.name: AutoCAD version, title block, CTB/STB, and BDPC standards confirmation
activation_gates.evidence: To be discussed before native drafting begins

truth_boundary: The public analytical reports remain project-control evidence. The contractual delivery for this authorization is one Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan in native AutoCAD DWG and PDF.
